# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-application
          image: registry.example.com/web-application:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http
          env:
            - name: APP_ENV
              value: "production"
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: WORKER_QUEUE_HOST
              value: "background-workers-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 5
          volumeMounts:
            - name: app-config
              mountPath: /etc/app/config
              readOnly: true
            - name: app-logs
              mountPath: /var/log/app
      volumes:
        - name: app-config
          configMap:
            name: web-application-config
        - name: app-logs
          emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-application-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  sessionAffinity: None
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: web-application-config
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    environment: production
data:
  app.conf: |
    server.port=8080
    cache.type=memcached
    cache.host=memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    cache.port=11211
    log.level=info
    environment=production
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
              protocol: TCP
              name: memcached
          args:
            - "-m"
            - "512"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
            - "-t"
            - "4"
            - "-v"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "768Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 11211
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: worker
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: worker
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-worker
          image: registry.example.com/background-worker:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
              name: metrics
          command:
            - "/app/worker"
          args:
            - "--concurrency=10"
            - "--queue=default,high,low"
          env:
            - name: APP_ENV
              value: "production"
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: WORKER_CONCURRENCY
              value: "10"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /alive
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 5
          volumeMounts:
            - name: worker-config
              mountPath: /etc/worker/config
              readOnly: true
            - name: worker-logs
              mountPath: /var/log/worker
      volumes:
        - name: worker-config
          configMap:
            name: background-workers-config
        - name: worker-logs
          emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 120
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: background-workers-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
  ports:
    - name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: background-workers-config
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    environment: production
data:
  worker.conf: |
    concurrency=10
    queues=default,high,low
    cache.type=memcached
    cache.host=memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local
    cache.port=11211
    log.level=info
    environment=production
    retry.max_attempts=5
    retry.backoff_seconds=30
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: web-application-hpa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    environment: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: web-application
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
  behavior:
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 60
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 1
          periodSeconds: 120
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: background-workers-hpa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    environment: production
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: background-workers
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 8
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 75
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
  behavior:
    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 60
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 60
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Pods
          value: 1
          periodSeconds: 120
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: web-application-pdb
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    environment: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: memcached-pdb
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    environment: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: background-workers-pdb
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    environment: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: worker
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: memcached-access-policy
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    environment: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
              tier: frontend
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: background-workers
              tier: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
